sourceName: HUD Residential Construction Permits by County - New York City Counties
notes: Official HUD open-data ArcGIS layer derived from Census Building Permits Survey annual county permit totals. Covers Bronx, Kings, New York, Queens, and Richmond counties and stores only aggregate all-residential, single-family, and multifamily permit counts by county and year. No individual addresses, names, devices, or household-level records are imported.
